title: Synthetic Interior Lab
desc: With the rise of generative AI and synthetic media-making, interior architecture is increasingly shaped through images, models, and narratives as much as through construction. Representation is no longer a neutral output; it has become an active design space where spatial ideas are tested, iterated, and made legible.

As AI and technology reshape the creative industries, how can musicians, artists, and innovators protect their work and rethink their business models? Join this exciting panel as we explore the future of intellectual property in the digital age.

Guillaume Helleu — HINT3RLAND
